highlights.title: Everything you need to apply with confidence
highlights.subtitle: Built specifically for applicants from Africa, Asia, and Latin America, the nationalities most affected by rejection.
highlights.h1.title: See what went wrong in a refusal
highlights.h1.desc: Our rejection analyser reviews your refusal letter and suggests a practical recovery plan before you spend more on a second attempt.
highlights.h2.title: Stay on top of deadlines
highlights.h2.desc: Biometric appointments, document expiry dates, and submission windows are easier to manage with reminders you can set once.
highlights.h3.title: Get clear answers as you go
highlights.h3.desc: Ask about document rules, interview questions, wait times, or what a refusal letter may mean for your next step.
highlights.h4.title: Find a verified agent when you need one
highlights.h4.desc: Our marketplace connects you with vetted immigration agents who specialise in your origin-destination route. No guesswork, no scams.
highlights.h5.title: Get support when it matters
highlights.h5.desc: Expert plan holders get priority email help from the Vericore team, with faster replies when your case is more complex.
highlights.h6.title: Your data stays private
highlights.h6.desc: Your information is protected. We do not sell your data or share it with third parties.

testimonials.label: Illustrative Examples
testimonials.title: What an applicant's experience can look like
testimonials.subtitle: Sample scenarios based on common applicant situations — not verified customer quotes.
testimonials.t1.text: Got my UK Student visa approved first attempt. The checklist caught two documents I completely forgot about.
testimonials.t2.text: The Sperrkonto tip alone saved my German student visa application. No other free tool told me that.
testimonials.t3.text: As a Nigerian in Poland the specific Polish resident checklist was a game changer. Zero guesswork.
faq.title: Common questions
faq.q1.q: Is the free plan really free?
faq.q1.a: Yes. No credit card required. You get 3 full checklists every month with document tips and embassy links at no cost.
faq.q2.a: Absolutely. Cancel before your next billing date and you won't be charged again. No questions asked.
faq.q3.q: How accurate is the checklist data?
faq.q3.a: Our team manually researches and updates requirements from official embassy websites. We recommend always double-checking the official portal before submitting.
faq.q4.a: No tool or person can guarantee visa approval. VisaClear is a guidance tool that significantly reduces your chance of rejection due to missing or incorrect documents.
faq.q5.a: We cover 24 destinations including the UK, USA, Canada, Germany, Poland, France, Australia, Netherlands, Ireland, UAE, Singapore, Japan, Spain, Portugal, and more. Coverage varies by your origin country. We add new destinations regularly.
final_cta.title: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready.
final_cta.subtitle: No credit card. No pressure. Just a better chance at the visa you need.
footer.disclaimer: VisaClear is a guidance tool, not legal advice.
